Gemini Omni Interactions processed the existing video and returned MP4, but continuity artefacts after the first second failed visual review.
The large ON AIR crop occluded the fingertip and the retime read as a press instead of a percussive strike-and-rebound.
Deterministic visual finish preserves the source hand and camera, creates two one-to-two-frame strike-and-rebound contacts, and restores a small exact ON AIR practical behind the hand.
Interactions rejected the literal audio-only formulation before output: The prompt could not be processed.
Omni returned AAC foley, but altered ON AIR and added a third accent; no generated video pixels were accepted.
The deterministic finish keeps F video frames unchanged and mounts only the first two approved Omni foley windows, omitting the third generated accent.

Gemini Omni Interactions rejected the intact key visual as image-to-video; then Vertex Omni rejected the take L video as video-to-video edit. Both return promptFeedback.blockReason=OTHER before candidate generation.
The full physical ON AIR practical was successful, but the contact held too long and read as pressure.
Explicit frame choreography yielded a slow press and a resonant second impact; do not encode the gesture as frame numbering in the prompt.
The in-set ON AIR and native foley passed the isolated checks, but the text-only plate changed the studio design, palette, microphone/boom and composition from the supplied 4K visual.
Exact 4K source visual continuity passed, but contact held too long/ambiguously and the native track did not establish exactly two isolated monitor-speaker responses.
Fal User is locked — Exhausted balance. No request_id, video or second provider charge was created.

A single Fal request completed after balance reload. Exact source design and practical continuity pass, but both contacts hold perceptibly and native audio contains non-contract activity/tails. Stop spend; no post repair or promotion.

geminiFoleyRecovery.sourceVideoDisposition: rejected; practical text drift and an extra third accent

guidedRecoveryTakes.seedanceTokenBilling: additional; Fal invoice is accounting source of truth
guidedRecoveryTakes.audioContract: Exactly two short amplified microphone/preamp/monitor-speaker responses, not direct skin-on-grille impacts; no music, voice, ambience or third accent.
guidedRecoveryTakes.nextValidRoute: resolve the source-state contradiction; if hover plus double tap remains required, approve a faithful pre-contact key visual before any new model test

rootCauseAudit.finding: The canonical 4K already shows fingertip-to-grille contact and visible blue signal arcs, but the immutable-first-frame contract requires an initial air gap and signal only after the second tap.
rootCauseAudit.magnificPreflight: video_plan reproduced the conflict and instructed the agent not to generate until the starting-state decision is resolved.
rootCauseAudit.requiredDecision: Either accept the current contact/signal as narrative frame zero or approve a new faithful pre-contact key visual. The latter is recommended if the two-tap action remains mandatory.
rootCauseAudit.stopRule: Maximum two equivalent failures per architecture; no audio before visual approval; no guide derived from a rejected take.

recoveryV2.visualRule: Generate or film one complete shot from the intact key visual; the existing practical remains part of the set from the first frame. No post-production visual overlay, crop, mask, tracking or retime may repair it.
recoveryV2.performanceRule: Two fingertip strikes with immediate rebound, never a press.
recoveryV2.audioRule: The audience hears two short microphone-to-preamp-to-monitor-speaker responses, not the direct grille impact. Native model audio is only a candidate and must pass isolated review.

recoveryV3.timingEvidence: contacts at frames 15 and 28; rebounds at 16 and 29
recoveryV3.visualDecision: The reconstruction looked rudimentary and materially worse than the supplied 4K key visual.
prohibitedNextActions: use blocking as a reference for another video model
